subject: Write Access is here
body:
----------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/b95a0b35-82ee-4c63-89ab-5438b82a808b/PU.png?t=1742336000)
Caption: 


--------------------
Back in March, we were the first newsletter platform to introduce an MCP.

The response from all of you has been incredible. But there was one request we heard again and again...

That’s why today we’re introducing **Write Access** for the beehiiv MCP 🥳. You can now:

✍️ Create and edit posts
⚡ Build multi-step automations
🚀 Launch products, polls, and surveys 

...all by simply chatting with your AI tool of choice.

The most successful newsletter operators are already using AI to move faster, automate repetitive work, and spend more time on what actually grows their business. Let me show you how...

_**ICYMI: **__We are hosting the __[Summer Release Event 2026](https://www.beehiiv.com/summer-release-2026)__ on July 16th. If you like these updates, you’re going to LOVE what we have in store for you next. It’s free, virtual, and just 30 minutes → __[RSVP](https://www.beehiiv.com/summer-release-2026)__. _


--------------------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/d9ef3f02-5f81-447b-8de0-a577e9d6d9b8/PU___beehiivmcpv3.png?t=1781135742)
Caption: 


--------------------
Let’s start with the basics…

You’ve probably used ChatGPT or Claude to answer a question or perform a task. Out of the box, both models know a ton and can search the web to find answers.

But what if you wanted Claude to read your emails? Or create a calendar invite on your behalf? To do that, Claude needs access to the tools where that information lives.

That's where an MCP comes in.

MCP is an open standard that lets AI tools connect directly to software like Gmail and Google Calendar, so you can get real work done just by chatting with Claude. 

In that example:

* Reading your emails → Gmail (read access)

* Creating calendar invites → Google Calendar (write access)

Now swap Gmail and Google Calendar for [beehiiv](https://app.beehiiv.com/), and consider everything you can accomplish with Claude connected to your publication. 

We shipped read access first, and it quickly became part of my daily workflow. Now, I wake up to a Slack message every morning with a full breakdown of my new subscribers from the day before. It took about three minutes to set up:

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/40acbc3f-ec64-43ef-bf11-87a6b2437336/Screenshot_2026-06-10_at_6.26.05_PM.png?t=1781141533)
Caption: 

**But that was just the start.** Write access for the beehiiv MCP unlocks a new world of possibilities. 

Here's what my newsletter workflow looks like now:

* I finish a rough draft and drop it into Claude for feedback.

* Claude proofreads it, tightens the copy, and suggests improvements.

* When I'm happy with the final version, I simply ask Claude to create the post for me in beehiiv using the exact template I always use.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/717ff063-5116-4cd0-8231-3101c12693e8/write-mcp.gif?t=1781534287)
Caption: 

Want to change the design? Just describe what you want. Claude can make style changes, update layouts, and even create entirely new templates for you. And don't worry about AI accidentally emailing your entire list. The MCP can create and edit content, but you're always in control of publishing.

It can also handle the tedious work you don’t feel like doing: adding content tags, generating alt text for images, updating metadata, and more.

Write access isn't limited to just posts. Here are a few prompts you can steal to put it to work across the beehiiv ecosystem:

**Templates**
_“Create three new templates styled to my brand, based on my best-performing posts.”_

**Automations**
_“Build an automation when a subscriber clicks a link about pricing, then tag them as ‘high intent’ and send them a follow-up email.” _

**Digital Products**
_“Create a $99 downloadable product based on my_ _most popular posts, with this description and image, and set it live so I can start selling today.”_

**Surveys**
_“Build my annual reader survey. I want to know who they are, what they want more of, and whether they’d be interested in a new podcast offering.”_

**Podcasts**
_“Write SEO-friendly titles, descriptions, and summaries for my last 10 episodes so they get discovered in search and on Apple/Spotify.”_

Just about anything you can do in beehiiv can now be done through your AI tool of choice.

Connect to the MCP → (https://app.beehiiv.com/settings/workspace/mcp)

“**Note:** Our MCP is available to all users, but write access is limited to users on our paid plans. You can learn more and/or upgrade [here](https://app.beehiiv.com/settings/workspace/billing_and_plan?utm_source=product.beehiiv.com&utm_medium=newsletter&utm_campaign=write-access-is-here).“ — 


--------------------
## Command Palette + Shortcuts 


--------------------
Power users, this one's for you.

Just press Cmd+K (or Ctrl+K) anywhere in beehiiv to open the new Command Palette. From there, you can jump between pages, trigger actions, and search across your account — without ever touching your mouse.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/8a10ffd0-4ee9-48ff-83d5-7a12a7e8c379/commandpallet.gif?t=1781025601)
Caption: 

Don’t need the ~~Ferrari~~ Command Palette? Use our new keyboard shortcuts to get where you need to go, faster.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/c5f02ec0-4073-4213-a129-1ca75b6ebae7/image__591_.png?t=1781130959)
Caption: 

It's one of those small improvements you'll notice every day.

Try It → Press Cmd+K (https://app.beehiiv.com/)


----------View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/97801238-a9c6-4e61-a330-3ccaea4c87ec/var1.png?t=1780441565)
Follow image link: (https://www.beehiiv.com/summer-release-2026)
Caption: 

----------
Tyler here (cofounder/CEO) 👋. Well, technically I’ve been here the whole time. I write each one of these updates myself.  

On July 16th, we’re hosting the [beehiiv Summer Release Event 2026](https://www.beehiiv.com/summer-release-2026). What we’re announcing will redefine what's possible on our platform and reshape the entire industry. 

It’s probably the project I’m most proud of in my entire career. I think you’re going to love it. 

It’s free, virtual, and just 30 minutes :). 

You Won’t Want to Miss It → RSVP (https://www.beehiiv.com/summer-release-2026)


--------------------
## Host Your Podcast on beehiiv


--------------------
No podcast yet? There’s never been a better time to hit record. In just a few clicks, you can launch your first show and start building audience relationships beyond the inbox.

Or if you already have one hosted elsewhere, you can cut that subscription and migrate your entire archive over to beehiiv in just a few minutes. 

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/af7cc042-0186-42bc-98cd-dbe2b98926fe/image.png?t=1774983935)
Caption: 

Upload new episodes directly to beehiiv, and we’ll automatically distribute them to every major podcast platform: Apple Podcasts, Spotify, Overcast, Castro, and beyond. 

Behind the scenes, we support MP3, M4A, and WAV, with automatic audio normalization so every episode sounds polished and consistent. Every upload also includes a full transcript, helping you get discovered in search and LLMs, improving accessibility, and turning every episode into reusable content.

### Y

----------

Caption: Brought to you by beehiiv.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/976540f0-e3f4-44fb-a535-5a761141e355/image__178_.png?t=1776368398)
Follow image link: (https://open.video/?utm_source=creator_spotlight_June_16&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter&utm_id=creator_spotlight&utm_term=creator_spotlight_mcp_ownership&utm_content=mcp_ownership)
Caption: 

Every creator has a shelf life. Jerome Aceti, who began working as a gaming YouTuber a decade and a half ago, recognized this early in his career. The way he’s transitioned his income from creator work to more traditional entrepreneur work is worth studying.

**In this episode:**

* 📉 [H](https://videos.creatorspotlight.com/v/hes-losing-subscribers-and-thats-a-good-thing?t=31)[e’s losing subscribers, but it doesn't matter](https://videos.creatorspotlight.com/v/hes-losing-subscribers-and-thats-a-good-thing?t=31)

* 📍 [Why now is the best time to start YouTube](https://videos.creatorspotlight.com/v/hes-losing-subscribers-and-thats-a-good-thing?t=1452)

* 💼 [Shifting from YouTuber to entrepreneur](https://videos.creatorspotlight.com/v/hes-losing-subscribers-and-thats-a-good-thing?t=2113)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/2c45c9f5-f463-4d88-b98f-4ff03891a477/Group_23.png?t=1781615716)
Follow image link: (https://videos.creatorspotlight.com/v/hes-losing-subscribers-and-thats-a-good-thing)
Caption: 

[**Listen**](https://www.creatorspotlight.com/podcast/s/tcsp/he_s_losing_subscribers_and_that_s_a_good_thing_ft_jerome_aceti) to the podcast | [**Watch**](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tD_cIGz-fBE) on YouTube | Scroll down to **read** our profile.

_— Natalia Pérez-González, Assistant Editor_


----------



----------
## Two clever ways to get ahead using Open.Video

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/63744f40-7095-4770-80e9-631b8c7418c1/Frame162803.png?t=1781619070)
Follow image link: (https://open.video/?utm_source=creator_spotlight_June_16&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter&utm_id=creator_spotlight&utm_term=creator_spotlight_mcp_ownership&utm_content=mcp_ownership)
Caption: 

Open.Video MCP Server + Claude OpenAI, Grok, or any LLM: Simply ask the LLM to upload a video, write and optimize the title, description, and tags, publish it to your own domain, and get it listed in Google video results — VideoObject schema and sitemaps generated for you.

The work that used to mean five tabs now happens in one message. Setup auto-sync and have all your YouTube content be updated simultaneously.

Customize your channel branding, control monetization and keep 100% of the revenue, and export your subscriber list any time you want. 

Upgrade your experience and take ownership of what you built.

Start or learn more at [https://open.video](https://open.video/?utm_source=creator_spotlight_June_16&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter&utm_id=creator_spotlight&utm_term=creator_spotlight_mcp_ownership&utm_content=mcp_ownership)

_This is an advertisement._


----------



----------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/eb47a50c-ecc6-4903-9943-1c384b903960/IN_THE_SPOTLIGHT.png?t=1744661614)
Caption: 

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/075aefa8-8293-438f-ad81-548ef9e41d6b/Jerome_Aceti_Featured.png?t=1781543504)
Follow image link: (http://creatorspotlight.com/p/jerome-aceti)
Caption: 

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/6b2c528c-fba8-4c05-bbe6-5bbf9aa09892/Natalia_Pe%CC%81rez-Gonza%CC%81lez.png?t=1780583096)
Follow image link: (https://www.linkedin.com/in/nmperez/)
Caption: 

## A creator plans for his own obsolescence 

Jerome Aceti has uploaded at least one YouTube video every single day since March 2013. His primary channel hosts **12K videos with over 2.47 billion total views**.

Known to his subscribers as [JeromeASF,](https://www.youtube.com/@JeromeASF/) Aceti is a career content creator, a serial co-founder, and an investor in creator-adjacent businesses. He started making gaming videos at 14, ran a paid Minecraft server through high school, and dropped out of college a month into his sophomore year, around 2013, after realizing he resented an upcoming exam for getting in the way of the creator work he so obsessed over.

For the decade that followed, that work — building and maintaining his YouTube presence — consumed him: 13 or 14 hours a day, seven days a week, occasionally five or six uploads across his various channels before he went to sleep.

**Across 2021 and 2022, Jerome’s career as a YouTuber finally hit its peak.**

Three years ago, the [JeromeASF](https://www.youtube.com/@JeromeASF/) channel had 5.5 million subscribers. It has since dropped to 5.3 million. These days, his daily uploads tend to land somewhere between 10k to 30k views — a fraction compared to his all-time hits, which range from 5 million to 8.9 million views. (Granted, these views have compounded over time — but all of his 1-million-plus-view videos are at least four years old).

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/e7da0dfb-f309-44a2-82e0-e09c67850fa1/Screenshot_2026-06-16_at_9.59.30_AM.png?t=1781618385)
Follow image link: (https://open.video/?utm_source=creator_spotlight_June_16&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter&utm_id=creator_spotlight&utm_term=creator_spotlight_mcp_ownership&utm_content=mcp_ownership)
Caption: 

Diminished view counts are a non-issue for Jerome. [Every creator has a shelf life](https://www.creatorspotlight.com/p/lia-haberman), and he’d been preparing to traverse the downslope of his creator career for years. He refers to the process, in earnest, as a _planned obsolescence._

To most creators, this subscriber and view count slide would be metabolized as a crisis, but Jerome takes it as evidence the platform is working the way it should, surfacing videos people actively choose to watch rather than rewarding him for an audience accumulated years ago. 

**"I get less views than ever," he tells us, "but that's how I know it's actually fair."**

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/febce6e3-a188-4d9a-9b24-8af21c486ca8/Content_Breaks__1_.png?t=1723054756)
Caption: 

## Jerome’s revenue breakdown

In place of the daily creator grind, Jerome leveraged his peak to assemble a portfolio of companies. He sought operators building in adjacent industries, lent his audience and his connections, and took a co-founder stake instead of running the companies as a CEO himself.

**At his 2021–22 peak, Jerome’s income came from:**

* 50% brand deals

* ~25% YouTube AdSense

* ~25% his business portfolio

* He owned no Minecraft server of his own then (the one from high school was long behind him), so much of that brand-deal money came from promoting _other_ people's servers, some of which made more than $1M a month

**Today, the mix has inverted:**

* ~50% from his business portfolio

* 20–25% from a Minecraft server he now runs himself — free to play, monetized through time-saving in-game upgrades, with 250–300 players online on a given evening

* The rest from brand deals and ad revenue 

The first company he built was a merchandise business designed to
